channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Trump hails US exceptionalism before veering into darkly political speech to usher in America 250
item.description: President Donald Trump has ushered in the 250th anniversary of American independence with soaring rhetoric about American exceptionalism before veering into a darkly political speech with warnings about communism.

item.title: A grand jury indicts Louisiana’s attorney general in a fight over changes to New Orleans courts
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding set for Friday at Madison Square Garden
